Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Number of times First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurs in cases that eventually reach SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are followed by Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in comparison with Manuscript Export Succeeded within the same cases
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of cases where First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation is immediately preceded by First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'First Look-Your updates are overdue'

Name: Number of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation events occurring after a revision cycle (i.e., following Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation activities that occur in variants ending with Manuscript Export Succeeded as the final step
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of variants where First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation appears more than once
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of cases in which First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation is followed within 7 days by Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' occurs

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all journal review processes
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences that are part of the longest variant (by activity count) in the log
Metric: Percentage of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases

Name: Number of times First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation directly follows First Look-Please submit updates
Metric: Number of 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' occurs

Name: Frequency of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation relative to the total number of submission-related confirmations (including Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' or activity == 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'"}"

Name: Percentage of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation events that belong to cases previously involving SW–Major Revision due in 1 week or SW–Minor Revision due in 1 week
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW–Major Revision due in 1 week' or activity == 'SW–Minor Revision due in 1 week'"}"

Name: Percentage of cases containing First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation that originated from a major or minor revision decision (e.g., after SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'"}"
